discouraged_translations: what one experiences emotionally, one conceptualizes
definition: MN 18 sequence line linking felt experience to recognition.
notes: This formula keeps vedanā-language immediate and sañjānāti as recognition-language. Do not psychologize vedeti into emotion-talk, and do not inflate sañjānāti into deeper knowing here. The line is the opening pivot of the MN 18 sequence.

example_phrases.notes: Opening movement of the MN 18 sequence.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the line connecting immediate felt experience to recognition.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use 'what one feels, one recognizes' as the default rendering when this formula is translated directly.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Use the controlled alternate only when the immediate English requires it. Do not widen vedeti into emotion-language or flatten sañjānāti into generic knowing.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the opening MN 18 line from drifting into psychologized feeling-language or over-heavy knowing-language.
